data.content: Plan: Add a custom case-insensitive substring filter to the <Command> component in SearchableOptionCombobox (settings-agents-scanned.tsx:202). The cmdk default filter uses command-score (fuzzy/word-boundary matching) which fails for partial model IDs like "glm" or "minimax". Fix is ~10 lines in a single file. No child knots needed — this is a straightforward single-file fix.
